prompt: Escalate the memo to Ken Lay, the audit committee, and internal legal, preserve the written record, and pause any broad reassurance until the accounting questions are reviewed.
summary: Sherron Watkins immediately escalates her Aug 22 memo: she asks Susan Schuler to escalate the memo to Ken Lay and the audit committee and to preserve the corporate record; she asks E. Haedicke for immediate legal review and a hold on broad reassurances; and she archives a dated copy in her own mailbox.

messages.subject: Escalation: The key questions I asked Lay on Aug 22
messages.body_text: Susan — Attached is the memo I raised with Ken Lay on Aug 22 outlining specific accounting and related-party concerns. Please escalate this immediately to Ken Lay and to the audit committee and ensure internal legal is engaged. Preserve this email and the attached memo in the corporate records (do not delete). Pause any broad reassuring communications, internal or external, until counsel and the audit committee have reviewed the accounting questions. Please confirm receipt and escalation. — Sherron
messages.rationale: Directs immediate escalation to the CEO and audit committee and orders preservation of the written record and a suspension of broad reassurance until review is complete.

messages.subject: Immediate legal review requested: Accounting questions raised to Lay on Aug 22
messages.body_text: E. — I am forwarding the memo I discussed with Ken Lay on Aug 22 that raises potential accounting and related-party issues. Please review immediately for legal exposure and advise on disclosure, communications, and next steps. Preserve this email and attachments in the legal file. Recommend a hold on any broad public reassurance until you and the audit committee complete your review. Acknowledge receipt and provide earliest availability to meet. — Sherron
messages.rationale: Engages internal legal to assess liabilities and communications strategy, requests preservation of documents, and asks legal to support a pause on reassurances pending review.

messages.subject: Record copy: The key questions I asked Lay on Aug 22 — Escalation log
messages.body_text: Archive copy of the memo and the escalation emails sent to .schuler and e..haedicke. Date-stamped record to preserve written evidence of my concerns and the instruction to escalate and pause public reassurance until legal/audit review is complete.
messages.rationale: Creates a dated internal record in Sherron's mailbox to preserve evidence of the concerns, the escalation instructions, and the pause on broad reassurance.
